name: geographic-nl
rationale: Newfoundland property; postal A1C 1A4 (A-prefix FSA = NL per FSA_LETTER_TO_PROVINCE map). F1.PC canonical-map resolves city/province from postal letter. Tests R10-D coverage for NL — distinct from NB but same regex/lookup family.
notes: Single-event sequence. NL is the rarest provincial coverage; pair with E28 (NB) for under-represented-province pair.
